title: Data Security Specialist (JD#10711)
description:
Job Summary

The Data Security Specialist is a technical specialist role within the Data Security Services team, responsible for managing, administering, and supporting Data Security and Endpoint Security technologies for the bank. The role acts as the technical point of contact for the Run team and serves as the last level of escalation for Security Specialists, ensuring smooth delivery of day-to-day operational services across Asia and Europe. 

Mandatory Skill-set

  • Must have 8+ years of IT Security experience with strong hands-on work in Antivirus, EDR, Endpoint Protection, and Email Security technologies such as Symantec, McAfee, Windows Defender, SentinelOne;
  • Proficient in deploying, integrating, upgrading, troubleshooting, and administering AV/EDR solutions across large enterprise environments;
  • Skilled in defining, designing, configuring, and enforcing enterprise-level endpoint and data security policies aligned with business and compliance requirements;
  • Broad understanding of multiple IT Security domains with the ability to apply a risk-based approach in operational decision-making;
  • Must have strong experience working in Production/Run Operations environments, with strong familiarity and comfort in ITIL-based processes;
  • Must have strong analytical, communication, documentation, organisational, and time-management capabilities, able to work independently or within a team under minimal supervision;
  • Experience managing high-volume, complex security environments in fast-paced setups; prior experience in financial organisations is an advantage;
  • Scripting knowledge in Python, Regular Expressions, PowerShell, and professional certifications such as CISSP and Symantec Certified Specialist (SEPM) are highly desirable.

Desired Skill-set

  • Capacity to develop others;
  • Good to have experience with SentinelOne, McAfee, Windows Defender, and scripting technologies such as Python, Regular Expressions, PowerShell;
  • Strong interpersonal skills and adaptability to changing environments.

Responsibilities

  • Act as the last level of escalation for team members and manage Incident, Problem, and Change processes;
  • Assign technical tasks, manage delegation, and promote collaboration and knowledge sharing within the team;
  • Participate in recruitment and support operational readiness within the team;
  • Manage incidents end-to-end, including fault investigation, escalation handling, monitoring alerts, and resolving user-raised tickets;
  • Serve as the final technical approver for Data Security system changes and remain accountable for all RUN/BAU technical activities;
  • Contribute to End-of-Life initiatives, migrations, new builds, and technical upgrades of security solutions;
  • Participate in global infrastructure events such as power-downs and disaster recovery tests;
  • Ensure full compliance with all norms, standards, processes, and procedures;
  • Conduct data leak investigations by gathering forensic evidence, performing interrogations (if required), and completing case closure and reporting;
  • Maintain accurate and updated technical documentation for operational use;
  • Lead continuous improvement initiatives and drive root cause analysis for high-severity issues;
  • Focus on automation and efficient utilisation of team resources to enhance productivity;
  • Stay updated with evolving security technologies and complete mandatory training requirements;
  • Ensure adherence to all legal, regulatory, and internal compliance requirements, including financial crime and reporting obligations;
  • Provide primary support for Asia and EMEA time zones with rotational shifts;
  • Support critical incidents or escalations during non-office hours when required.


Should you be interested in this career opportunity, please send in your updated resume to recruit@sciente.com at the earliest.

When you apply, you voluntarily consent to the disclosure, collection and use of your personal data for employment/recruitment and related purposes in accordance with the SCIENTE Group Privacy Policy, a copy of which is published at SCIENTE’s website (https://www.sciente.com/privacy-policy).

Confidentiality is assured, and only shortlisted candidates will be notified for interviews.

EA Licence No. 07C5639

postedCompany.description:
As a trusted business technology parther in intelligent transformation & technology talent services, our value-added services are in the following areas:
- AI-led Intelligentisation,
- Data Engineering and Intelligence,
- Insurance & Financial services focused Business Technology Consulting and
- Various technology talent management/recruitment solutions.


Sciente International Pte Ltd, a member of SCIENTE, is an ISO9001:2015, Data Protection Trustmark (by IMDA) and Great Place to Work Certified, multi-award winning, specialist Business Technology Consulting partner for our clients in intelligent transformation and technology talent managemnent services, across the industries and government sector.


At Sciente International, we orchestrate a symphony of innovation, expertise, and growth.  We like to help redefine what’s possible when Technology, Talent, and Transformation converge. 


With 17+ years of experience delighting clients by combining technology, talent and transformation, we have an excellent track record. We believe our credentials can make you comfortable with us:

  • Laser-like focus on Data & AI, talent and transformation: we seek strong partnerships with our clients, and they rely on us for IT modernization & intelligentisation
  • Technology and industry specialization: we accurately understand clients’ needs because of our practices and specialization. Clients trust and prefer to work with us exclusively. Most of our business is from existing clients.
  • Multi-award-winning, ISO 9001:2015 and Data Protection Trustmark certified: mature, proven processes and methodologies to consistently deliver high-quality IT services. You can rely on us to deliver on promises.
  • Strong leadership team which provides direction, clarity, professionalism and motivation: We are led by a strong leadership team with decades of work experience within IT industry and with good hearts.
  • Values matter most: our honest, ethical and transparent Consultants provide expert, consultative advice for informed career decisions
  • “Our mission – Delighted clients & community”: Sciente organization is a hybrid organization, in which profit-making businesses sponsor the social innovations, community services & nature sustainability efforts. Besides, we assist clients while providing our Consultants careers with meaning. This approach lets our Consultants go the extra mile.

The organization affirms the importance of giving back to the community.  


Since its inception, Sciente group has won over 40 awards, including the HR Champion Award (SME & Start-up category) in 2023 by SHRI, Peak Tech Laureates 2020 Award under Human Capital Management category (2020) and various awards for Corporate Social Responsibility, with continued revenue growth. Sciente group of companies maintain a firm presence in Singapore (HQ), Malaysia, India and USA market, with a considerable track record of service delivery success stories.

To know more, please visit - https://www.sciente.com
